fomod.Name: F4 Discord Rich Presence
fomod.Author: xt0n1
fomod.Description: Live Fallout 4 player state on your Discord profile. One F4SE DLL covers old-gen 1.10.163 and the entire Next-Gen line (1.10.984 / 1.11.169 / 1.11.191), with every line of the layout editable in a plain INI. Per-state small images, two profile buttons, full status parity, and the engine never goes down with it.
